seed_problem: Given a fixed availability/deadline trace, choose Spot/On-Demand/pause per step to minimize cost; checker replays the trace and scores baseline/cost.
mutation: composite: replay the spot-vs-on-demand-vs-pause trace as a STATIC multi-room capacitated lot-sizing problem -- a single shared refrigeration plant must keep N independent cold-storage reserves non-negative over the whole horizon, with per-step spot availability/prices, a throughput cap, capacity clipping and cold-start costs; minimize total energy cost. Joint reserves + shared throughput make the optimum intractable (multi-item CLSP).
title: Cold-Chain Replay: Vaccine Reserve Power Scheduling
strategies: all-grid baseline: every step buy grid power and refill exactly the load per room (the scoring baseline)
reactive greedy: produce only the minimum needed to keep each reserve non-negative, using spot power when solar happens to be available at that step, grid otherwise
lookahead pre-store: during cheap spot windows fill rooms toward capacity (subject to throughput) so grid use during no-solar stretches is minimized; coast on stored cold otherwise
randomized / local-search refinement over pre-store thresholds and start-cost batching
